mapper.sql: id, session_id, user_id, project_name, capability_type, capability_name, triggered_at, tokens_consumed, duration_ms, result_status, trace_id, created_stime, modified_stime, is_del
mapper.select: SELECT capability_type AS type, capability_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM metrics_skill_usage WHERE DATE(triggered_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY capability_type, capability_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE(triggered_at) AS date, capability_type AS type, capability_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM metrics_skill_usage WHERE DATE(triggered_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY date, capability_type, capability_name ORDER BY date

SELECT capability_name AS topSkill, COUNT(*) AS skillCallCount FROM metrics_skill_usage WHERE capability_type = 'skill' AND DATE(triggered_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY capability_name ORDER BY skillCallCount DESC LIMIT 1
